dispositions.merge-into-ppw-issue: Relevant but overlaps an existing PPW migration issue; fold into the target rather than duplicate.
dispositions.migrate-as-ppw-issue: Still relevant as PPW implementation or planning work; represent as a PPW issue or checklist item.
dispositions.defer-to-post-integration: Relevant, but PPW evidence-module schemas, registries, claim-promotion gates, or validation fixtures should exist before implementation is recreated.

closureNote: Closure instructions are recommendations only. Do not close child-project issues automatically; prepare comments and wait for maintainer approval.
